div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 848px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
CREATE TABLE documents (
rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
ulid TEXT UNIQUE, -- kb item 的 ulid；event 用合成键 'event:{lang}:{date}'
kind TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'item' | 'event' | 'user'
lang TEXT, -- en / ja / ...
item_type TEXT, -- vocab/phrase/grammar/pragmatics/others；event/user 为 NULL
file_path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, -- 相对 $workspace/memory 的路径
slug TEXT,
headword TEXT,
title TEXT,
intro_in_interface_lang TEXT,
intro_in_target_lang TEXT,
aliases TEXT, -- '\n' 连接
related TEXT, -- '\n' 连接
tags TEXT, -- ' ' 连接，便于过滤
first_seen TEXT,
last_seen TEXT,
seen_count INTEGER,
schema_version INTEGER,
body TEXT NOT NULL, -- frontmatter 后的 markdown 原文，供 chunks 切分/展示/content_hash
content_hash TEXT NOT NULL, -- 整文件 hash（基于原文），跳过未变更的重嵌入与重索引
file_mtime TEXT NOT NULL, -- ISO 字符串，watcher 去抖与对账依据
indexed_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 588px; height: 1px; padding-top: 587px; margin-left: 1012px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
-- 全文索引：字段化，便于按字段加权与高亮
-- 各列存「分词后空格连接」文本；body_raw 存原文供 snippet() 干净高亮
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE documents_fts USING fts5(
headword, title,
intro_in_interface_lang, intro_in_target_lang,
aliases, related, tags, body,
body_raw UNINDEXED, -- 原文，仅给 snippet() 用，不索引
tokenize='unicode61'
);

switch.text: -- 全文索引：字段化，便于按字段加权与高亮...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 758px; height: 1px; padding-top: 587px; margin-left: 1902px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
//段级文本，向量作用层
CREATE TABLE chunks (
chunk_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
doc_rowid INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES documents(rowid) ON DELETE CASCADE,
chunk_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
section_title TEXT, -- '## 例句' / '## Event' / NULL
section_kind TEXT, -- 'event'|'explanation'|'example'|'memory_hook'|...
text TEXT NOT NULL, -- 该段清洗后纯文本（原文，不分词）
char_offset INTEGER, -- 在 body 中的起点，用于命中后定位/滚动
content_hash TEXT NOT NULL, -- 段 hash（基于原文），跳过未变更段的重嵌入
UNIQUE(doc_rowid, chunk_index)
);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 628px; height: 1px; padding-top: 987px; margin-left: 1967px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
-- 嵌入表 vec0 索引
CREATE TABLE chunk_embeddings (
chunk_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES chunks(chunk_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
model_id TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'bge-m3:1024' 等，换模型时按此作废
dim INTEGER NOT NULL,
embedding BLOB NOT NULL,
embedded_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 917px; margin-left: 1012px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
-- 元信息：分词器版本、schema 版本，启动时比对触发重建
CREATE TABLE meta (
key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
value TEXT
);
key:
- tokenizer_version
- embedding_model_id 标识 embedding 模型
- embedding_dim embedding 维度数
- embedding_schema_version

switch.text: -- 元信息：分词器版本、schema 版本，启动时比对触发重建...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 628px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1237px; margin-left: 1967px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Courier New"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS
chunk_vec USING vec0(chunk_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, embedding FLOAT[:dim])

switch.text: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS...
